arts.ttl: Maresca 'very happy' with 'fantastic' Chelsea after Everton draw
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is full of praise for his side's performance in their 0-0 draw at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: Everton players have 'come through a storm' - Dyche
arts.sum: Sean Dyche praises his "relentless" Everton players following their 0-0 draw with Chelsea at Goodison Park.

arts.ttl: “I’m leaving in January” – West Ham linked with shock move for wantaway former Chelsea star
arts.sum: West Ham United are considering a January move for ex-Chelsea playmaker Hakim Ziyech, according to reports. Ziyech joined Chelsea from Ajax in the summer of 2020 but failed to recreate his stunning Amsterdam form, managing just 14 goals and 13 assists in 107 games for the Blues — though he did win a Champions League […] The post “I’m leaving in January” – West Ham linked with shock move for wantaway former Chelsea star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Chelsea sent surprise Victor Osimhen transfer instruction as Enzo Maresca told to complete deal
arts.sum: "I think Victor Osimhen would be a top player in the Premier League, but I wouldn’t necessarily say that the striker position is where Chelsea should be prioritising in the next few transfer windows," Wright-Phillips told sportscasting.com . Meanwhile, others have claimed that Chelsea must ensure they sign a new striker in the New Year, with the club linked with Nigeria international Victor Osimhen .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca explains why he was 'absolutely happy' with Chelsea's goalless draw
arts.sum: Chelsea drew 0-0 with Everton on Sunday but Enzo Maresca was pleased with his side's performance.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca's Chelsea worries justified as Everton pass audition in front of new owners
arts.sum: EVERTON 0-0 CHELSEA: It ended all square at Goodison Park at both Everton and Chelsea showed the good and the bad of their season during a hard-fought draw on Sunday

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans are annoyed that Enzo Maresca left ‘fantastic’ player on the bench vs Everton
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca watched his Chelsea side drop two points on the road during Sunday’s trip to Everton in the Premier League. Chelsea could only manage...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid & Chelsea eyeing move for Las Palmas talent
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid have been joined in the hunt for Las Palmas talent Dário Essugo by one of the leading clubs in the Premier League. That’s according to…

arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen sends new Chelsea message as £63m January transfer chance confirmed
arts.sum: Osimhen was in talks with the Blues during the summer transfer window as Enzo Maresca searched for alternative forward options to challenge Nicolas Jackson .
